creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Build details
=============

sysutils/munin-node 2.0.49

     JAVA=off: Include JAVA plugins
     PERL=on: Include all Perl modules (adds dependencies)
     PYTHON=on: Include Python plugins
     SNMP=on: Include SNMP plugins

FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE-p8 amd64


Sample error logs
=================

2019/05/19-10:50:13 [53090] Error output from ntp_my-ntp-server.example.com:
2019/05/19-10:50:13 [53090]     Can't locate Net/IP.pm in @INC (you may need to install the Net::IP module) (@INC contains: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.28 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.28/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.28) at /usr/local/etc/munin/plugins/ntp_my-ntp-server.example.com line 57.
2019/05/19-10:50:13 [53090]     BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/etc/munin/plugins/ntp_my-ntp-server.example.com line 57.
2019/05/19-10:50:13 [53090] Service 'ntp_my-ntp-server.example.com' exited with status 2/0.
